title: Panjab University Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 02 Guest Faculty Posts
description: The Punjab University has announced the official notification for the recruitment of 02 Guest Faculty Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in B.Sc, M.Sc, Post Graduation, or Diploma can grab this chance and apply for the Punjab University Notification 2026 . For more details, such as the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts mentioned below. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by the last date of applicatio...
